  3. UV DTF Transfers

Custom UV DTF Transfers

Create Custom UV DTF Transfers!

â˜…â˜…â˜…â˜…â˜…

Read All Reviews
  • Order Process
  • Production Times
  • Artwork
  • Shipping

Design Methods

Design from Scratch

With our easy to use online designer, you can quickly design your DTF Decals. Just upload an image or logo from your computer, or choose from our wide selection of clipart to create your personalized circle sticker.

Upload a File

If you decide to upload an original file, instead of designing your own, you will need to upload an .eps file. This ensures that you will receive the highest quality DTF Decal possible! Once you have added your product to your cart and select your shipping method, a proof will be emailed to you. When you approve your proof and make a payment, your order will be complete.

Payment

All circle stickers must be paid up front prior to being put into production. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards. We also accept checks, which must be received prior to your circle stickers being put into production. 

Live Order Tracking

Back in the early days of making decals, we built a system called Live Order Tracking that enables our customers to track their order through every stage of our streamlined process, from order placement to delivery.

After placing your order for DTF Decals, you’ll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email that will allow you to track your decals every step of the way. Need the current status of your order? Just click the link in the email and get the most recent updates from our dynamic Live Order Tracking system.

Production Time Tables

Our flexible production times range from three to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

5 Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

7 Business Day:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5 Day Saver option.

  • Orders approved  after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

DTD Decals Artwork Specification

Preferred Files for Printing

The maximum file size we accept is 100 MB. Our preferred file types are:

  • Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script)
  • PDF (Adobe PDF)

When submitting these files, make sure you convert all fonts to outlines or curves to ensure they print correctly and the fonts are not substituted. 

Additional Files Accepted

  • JPG (High Resolution JPEG)
  • TIFF (High Resolution TIFF)
  • PNG (High Resolution PNG)

File Tips

  • Set up size proportionate to the exact size product you are ordering 
  • Convert all text to outlines 
  • Only Allow for bleed if necessary
  • Never flatten/merge layers in a PSD file
  • Indicate the cut line clearly for all decal products

Vector Art

Vector art consists of lines and curves that are mathematically defined objects. When viewing art in key line mode you can see the points or vectors when connecting your lines and curves. They can also be seen when using the pen tool or editing the points along a path. Vector art is ideal for type and drawn shapes because they can be enlarged to any size while maintaining crisp outlines and details without sacrificing quality. The distance between the vectors is calculated mathematically and is not dependent upon resolution. 

Raster Art

Raster images consist of colored squares, called pixels. They are created by combining a series of various colored pixels. Digital photographs are made up of pixels. If you view a raster image at 200% or more you are able to see the individual pixels that make up the image. Raster images are dependent upon resolution so image enlargement is limited by the individual size at which the file was created. If a file is produced at a size that is larger than its resolution will allow, the quality will decrease. Printing a low resolution file will result in pixelation. Individual pixels are large enough to be easily discernable. Increasing the resolution will not solve this problem is there are not enough pixels to begin with. The program will add more pixels based upon the estimation of their location and will then assign their neighboring pixels's color value. This may cause an image to look muddy. 

If submitting these files, please follow the guidelines below:

  • 100% scale (full size output) at 100 dpi
  • 50% scale at 200 dpi or higher
  • 25% scale at 300 dpi or higher
  • 10% scale at 600-1200 dpi recommended

Design Services

If you are not able to provide us with a good quality image, we do have a vectorizing/recreating service available. Most logos or images can be recreated for as little as $15; however images with more detail are subject to quoting prior to vectorizing the image. Please contact a sales representative for more details.

This service needs to be paid for in advance of us printing your order. We will keep your recreated vector artwork on file for you to use on all future orders.

Releasing the recreated vector artwork to you for personal use can be done for an additional cost.

Shipping

  • You can expect your Decals.com order to arrive within 2 - 4 business days (after production time) to 90% of the United States.
  • Unless otherwise specified, at the time of ordering, your DTF Decals will ship via UPS Ground.
  • If you have any questions about shipping rates or rush production, please contact our friendly Customer Service Representatives at (320) 391-5250 prior to ordering.
  • You will receive a tracking number once your package has shipped.
  • To read more about our shipping information visit our shipping policy page.

Shipping Methods:

  • Economy (5-15 Days)
  • Standard (3-5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)

Important Economy Shipping Notes:

  • If choosing economy shipping, please include additional postal information such as your P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.
  • Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to. 

National and International Shipping Notes:

  • Decals.com ships throughout the United States and Internationally.
  • All international shipments must have shipping labels as well as customs documentation provided by the customers. We will only accept international shipping labels from the following carriers, USPS and UPS.
  • Contact a Customer Service Representative at (320) 391-5250 for more information.

Decals.com is your go to DTF transfer printer. Crafted for businesses looking to make a bold statement, these UV DTF decals marry durability with exquisite detail, ensuring your brand captures attention and stays memorable.

Our UV DTF transfers represent the cutting-edge in print technology. They allow for vibrant, full-color images with incredible clarity to be transferred onto virtually any surface. This method ensures a level of detail and color fidelity that traditional decals can't match, making your brand visuals more striking and engaging than ever before.

    For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.

      More About UV DTF DecalsReturn to Top

      The main difference between these transfer stickers and other stickers or decal products is that only your image remains behind. 

      The three layers of these adhesive marvels are:

      1. DTF Transfer Paper (Backing): This is the bottom layer. It protects the adhesive layer until the decals are ready to be applied. 
      2. Printed Decal Layer: The decal design lives on this layer. In the DTF transfer printing process UV inks are used and cured directly onto this layer. With a strong adhesive, this layer offers the permanent adhesion to the surface of application.\
      3. DTF Transfer Film (Clear Top Layer): The DTF transfer film holds the design in its place once the backing has been removed. This layer allows for ease of positioning and application. Once the decal is applied, simply peel away the transfer film, leaving the vibrant colors of your design. 

      It’s similar to how a temporary tattoo is applied—except that these stickers are permanent.

      We also offer DTF iron ons, also referred to as heat transfers. These quality prints are great for custom apparel, tote bags, and more. Check out our blog for more information on the difference between DTF decals and heat transfers. For a traditional sticker product that lays flat, check out our custom vinyl stickers.

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

       

      How to Apply UV DTF Transfers

      Step 1: Prepare the Surface

      • Make sure the item is clean and smooth.
      • Wipe the area with an alcohol wipe or a cloth dampened with isopropyl alcohol.
      • Let it dry completely before applying the transfer.

      Step 2: Remove the Backing Sheet

      • Peel off the paper or plastic backing to expose the adhesive side of the design.

      • Be careful not to touch the sticky surface.

      Step 3: Position and Apply the Design

      • Place the transfer adhesive-side down on your item.
      • Press firmly, smoothing from the center outward to remove any air bubbles.
      • Take your time—smooth, even pressure ensures the best results.

      Step 4: Remove the Top Film

      • Slowly peel away the clear top film at a sharp angle.
      • If the design lifts with the film, press it back down firmly and peel again from a different angle.
      • Go slowly for the cleanest transfer.

      Step 5: Finish and Set

      • Your design is now applied!
      • For extra durability, place the item in sunlight or under a UV lamp for 30–60 seconds (optional).

      Customer Reviews ... Reviews

      â˜…â˜…â˜…â˜…â˜…

      Don't take our word for it! See what others are saying.

        More Reviews

      Why Choose Decals.com?

      Customer Service

      Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

      Made in the USA

      All of our products are proudly made and manufactured here in the USA!

       

      Fast Turnaround

      Standard turnaround time ships your product within three business days.

      Track Your Order

      Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary live order tracking system.

      Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

      What is a DTF Transfer Decal?

      DTF stands for Direct to Film. DTF printing is unique. It offers high durability and vibrant UV-cured color that is printed directly onto a thin, clear film material.

      They come in two types of decal - heat transfers, which are custom iron on transfers used on clothing, and the adhesive DTF image transfer stickers featured here.

      They are also known in the industry as UV DTF decals, DTF Transfer Stickers and Image Transfer Stickers. These decals are not iron on designs. As opposed to iron on decals, these decals feature a strong adhesive backing that does not require an iron or heat press. To apply, simply peel the design from the carrier film, apply to the selected surface and press down firmly. 

      Can I apply DTF Decals on textured surfaces?

      We recommend applying them to smooth surfaces for optimal adhesion. Surfaces with texture may hinder the decal's ability to stick firmly.

      Can I reposition my DTF decals?

      No, you cannot reposition them. They are created for a secure and long-lasting adhesion. To guarantee the appropriate alignment, plan the placement before applying.

      If you need a removable sticker solution, then we suggest trying one of our low-tack products. Low tack vinyl allows you to apply and reposition them several times.

      What is the minimum order amount?

      The minimum quantity you can order is 10 units. There is a bulk order discount, so the more you order the more money you’ll save.

      What is the minimum size I can order?

      The smallest decal you can get is 2" x 2" inches.

      Common Uses

      What are UV DTF Transfers typically used for?

      They are commonly used to place lettering, logos or designs onto a desired surface. Most people use them to brand products, equipment, machinery, windows, doors, vehicles, and trailers.

      They’re also dishwasher safe, so people love to put them on coffee tumblers or hydro-flasks. In fact, there are a number of small businesses that specialize in this venture.

      What surfaces can I use these on?

      Smooth, non-porous surfaces such as glass, metal, plastic, smooth or painted drywall, and tile work best for these stickers.

      Can I use these outdoors?

      Yes, they are made to withstand a variety of environmental variables, making them suitable for outdoor use. The high-quality materials ensure durability and long-term fade resistance.

       

      Order DTF Decals

Vector art is ideal for type and drawn shapes because they can be enlarged to any size while maintaining crisp outlines and details without sacrificing quality. The distance between the vectors is calculated mathematically and is not dependent upon resolution. Raster Art Raster images consist of colored squares, called pixels. They are created by combining a series of various colored pixels. Digital photographs are made up of pixels. If you view a raster image at 200% or more you are able to see the individual pixels that make up the image. Raster images are dependent upon resolution so image enlargement is limited by the individual size at which the file was created. If a file is produced at a size that is larger than its resolution will allow, the quality will decrease. Printing a low resolution file will result in pixelation. Individual pixels are large enough to be easily discernable. Increasing the resolution will not solve this problem is there are not enough pixels to begin with. The program will add more pixels based upon the estimation of their location and will then assign their neighboring pixels's color value. This may cause an image to look muddy. If submitting these files, please follow the guidelines below: 100% scale (full size output) at 100 dpi 50% scale at 200 dpi or higher 25% scale at 300 dpi or higher 10% scale at 600-1200 dpi recommended Design Services If you are not able to provide us with a good quality image, we do have a vectorizing/recreating service available. Most logos or images can be recreated for as little as $15; however images with more detail are subject to quoting prior to vectorizing the image. Please contact a sales representative for more details. This service needs to be paid for in advance of us printing your order. We will keep your recreated vector artwork on file for you to use on all future orders. Releasing the recreated vector artwork to you for personal use can be done for an additional cost. Unless otherwise specified, at the time of ordering, your DTF Decals will ship via UPS Ground. You will receive a tracking number once your package has shipped. To read more about our shipping information visit our shipping policy page. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to. National and International Shipping Notes: Decals.com ships throughout the United States and Internationally. All international shipments must have shipping labels as well as customs documentation provided by the customers. We will only accept international shipping labels from the following carriers, USPS and UPS. Contact a Customer Service Representative at (320) 391-5250 for more information.
